LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MARCH-18-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DELVIN REED'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT, THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT. THE COURT FURTHER SCHEDULES A FINAL APPROVAL HEARING TO AUGUST 13, 2024, AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 302. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
